track: rr-8 - Today is Yesterday x Make 'em say Errr
notes: Groundhog-day anxiety. Tight AAB triplets. 'You're on your way to nowhere now' is the thesis — final section collapses to 'nowhere' without 'now'. 1.84s hold on 'You're' mid-collapse. AUDITED 2026-04-20: the three 'hook' iterations are ribbons so the 'You're on your way to nowhere now' payoff at each section lands as the actual moment. Final sustained 'You're' becomes the key; everything else rides the ribbon lanes.

chunks.note: Today is yesterday over, over — hook #1 pt1 ribbon, mixed
Press rewind and play — hook #1 pt2 ribbon
You're on your way to nowhere now #1 — first payoff ribbon
You're on your way to nowhere now #2 — ribbon
Today is yesterday over — bridge ribbon
You're on your way to nowhere now — 1.84s 'You're' hold, biggest mid-song moment, KEY
final payoff with 'now' — closing KEY, return of the word
